data.title: Data shows that 73 projects have raised over $10 million in funding in the past three months, primarily concentrated in prediction markets, payments, and RWA (Real-Time Analysis and Evaluation) sectors.
data.description: Crypto KOL @pgreyy posted on the X platform that, according to DefiLlama funding data, a total of 73 projects raised over $10 million in the past three months. The list shows a significant decrease in venture capital interest in L1 public chains, with only Tempo, an L1 payment public chain, making the list. VCs are primarily focusing on the following five areas: - Prediction markets - Payment systems (+ banking) - RWA - Infrastructure linked to ordinary users or RWA - DeFi. Furthermore, only two AI-related companies met the $10 million funding requirement in the past three months; excluding the funding period, this number is nine.

data.title: Venture Capital Shifts Focus in Crypto Investments
data.description:
According to Odaily, crypto influencer @pgreyy shared on the X platform that DefiLlama's funding data reveals a significant shift in venture capital interest over the past three months. During this period, 73 projects secured funding exceeding $10 million, with a noticeable decline in interest towards Layer 1 public chains. Only Tempo, a Layer 1 payment blockchain, made the list.

Venture capital firms are primarily concentrating on five areas:

- Prediction markets

- Payment systems (including banking services)

- Real World Assets (RWA)

- Infrastructure linked to regular users or RWA

- Decentralized Finance (DeFi)

Additionally, only two AI-related companies met the $10 million funding criteria in the past three months, although the number rises to nine when not considering the funding timeline.

data.title: Kalshi, Crypto.com, Robinhood, Coinbase, and Underdog, five major platforms, have jointly established the Prediction Market Alliance, dedicated to the compliant development of the prediction market.
data.description: Five prominent organizations—Kalshi, Crypto.com, Robinhood, Coinbase, and Underdog—jointly announced the formation of the Coalition for Prediction Markets (CPM). According to official sources, nearly half of Americans under the age of 45 have used prediction markets, and the market continues to expand rapidly. In October of this year, the prediction market industry was valued at $28 billion. Prediction markets outperform traditional polls by approximately 30%. Furthermore, over 70% of Americans agree on a key point: prediction markets should not be treated as gambling.

data.title: BTC Whale Transfers Significant Amount to New Address
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Onchain Lens monitoring has reported that a prominent Bitcoin whale, known as 'BTC OG Insider Whale,' transferred 5,152 BTC to a new address. This transaction occurred five minutes prior to the report.

data.title: Sources say the Bank of Japan will pledge further interest rate hikes at its policy meeting next week.
data.description: According to three sources, the Bank of Japan (BOJ) is likely to maintain its commitment to continue raising interest rates next week, but will emphasize that the pace of further increases will depend on the economy's response to each hike. BOJ Governor Kazuo Ueda has essentially announced a December rate hike ahead of schedule, and the market has almost fully priced in the possibility of raising the rate from 0.5% to 0.75% in December. Market focus has shifted to the extent to which the BOJ can raise rates to a neutral level. Sources say that while the central bank may internally update its estimate of the policy rate's distance from what is considered neutral, it will not use this estimate as the primary communication tool for future rate hike paths due to the difficulty in making precise predictions. Instead, the sources indicate that the BOJ will explain that future rate hike decisions will be based on considerations of how past rate hikes have affected bank lending, corporate financing conditions, and other economic activity. One source stated, "Japan's real interest rates are very low, which allows the BOJ to continue raising rates in several phases," a view echoed by two other sources. (Jinshi)

data.title: Aave Introduces V4 Liquidation Engine to Enhance Efficiency
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Aave is set to launch its V4 liquidation engine, replacing the fixed mechanism of V3. The new system introduces dynamic liquidation thresholds and an automated auction mechanism, aiming to reduce manual intervention and improve liquidation speed and capital efficiency. By integrating on-chain oracles and MEV (miner extractable value) protection, the process aims to minimize slippage and manipulation risks. Additionally, the engine supports partial liquidation and batch processing, allowing borrowers to avoid full liquidation at a lower cost.

Aave has reported handling nearly 295,000 liquidations since its inception, with a total value exceeding $3.3 billion.
